D

descriptionOfAction - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.Device
 
Device - Class in cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices
This class represents abstract class for device.

Creates new Device with given name ,consumption and state.
DeviceFactory - Class in cz.cvut.fel.omo.factory
This class is factory for devices.

This class represents handler for device.

Dishwasher - Class in cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices
This class represents dishwasher.
Dishwasher(String, Consumption, DeviceState, String) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.devices.Dishwasher
Creates new Dishwasher with given name ,consumption and state.
doDeviceActivity(Event) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.controller.HouseController
This method tries to generate device activity.
doesFloorExist(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.builders.HouseBuilder
Returns whether the floor exists.
doesRoomExist(String) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.builders.HouseBuilder
Returns whether the room with declared name exists.
doNoActivity(Event) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.controller.HouseController
This method generates no activity (= waiting), if no other activities were available.
doRound(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.controller.Start
Simulates one round.
doRounds(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.controller.Start
Simulates given number of rounds.
doSport - cz.cvut.fel.omo.model.family.PersonActivity
 
doSportActivity(Event) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.omo.controller.HouseController
This method tries to generate sport activity.
